phonetic: 藢f蓹蕣t蓹蕣藢p蓲lim蓹ra瑟藞ze瑟蕛蓹n
phoneticUs: 藞fo蕣to蕣p蓱藧l瑟m蓹r蓹藞ze瑟蕛n
meaning: n.鍏夎仛浣滅敤,鍏夊寲鑱氬悎(浣滅敤)
examples: Researches on the two-photon photopolymerization technology of SU8 negative photoresist have been processed.
The self-assembly and photopolymerization of compounds containing diacetylene group were studied on HOPG surface.
The photopolymerization process of acrylate monomer initiated by benzoin ether has been studied by two kinds of fluorescence probe.
